title: One Piece
author: Eiichiro Oda
description: A pirate adventure following Monkey D. Luffy and his crew searching for the One Piece treasure.

title: Naruto
author: Masashi Kishimoto
description: A young ninja seeks recognition and dreams of becoming Hokage.

title: Bleach
author: Tite Kubo
description: Ichigo Kurosaki gains Soul Reaper powers and protects humans from evil spirits.

title: Attack on Titan
author: Hajime Isayama
description: Humanity fights for survival against giant humanoid creatures known as Titans.

title: Demon Slayer
author: Koyoharu Gotouge
description: Tanjiro Kamado becomes a demon slayer to save his sister and avenge his family.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen
author: Gege Akutami
description: Yuji Itadori enters the world of curses after swallowing a powerful cursed object.

title: My Hero Academia
author: Kohei Horikoshi
description: Izuku Midoriya trains to become a hero in a world where most people have superpowers.

title: Dragon Ball
author: Akira Toriyama
description: Goku's journey from childhood martial artist to defender of Earth and beyond.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist
author: Hiromu Arakawa
description: Two brothers search for the Philosopher's Stone after a failed alchemy experiment.

title: Hunter x Hunter
author: Yoshihiro Togashi
description: Gon Freecss becomes a Hunter while searching for his father.

title: Death Note
author: Tsugumi Ohba
description: Light Yagami discovers a notebook that can kill anyone whose name is written in it.

title: Tokyo Ghoul
author: Sui Ishida
description: Ken Kaneki struggles with his new life after becoming part ghoul.

title: Spy x Family
author: Tatsuya Endo
description: A spy, an assassin, and a telepath form a fake family while hiding their identities.

title: Black Clover
author: Yuki Tabata
description: Asta aims to become Wizard King despite being born without magic.

title: Haikyu!!
author: Haruichi Furudate
description: A short but determined volleyball player joins Karasuno High's team.

title: Slam Dunk
author: Takehiko Inoue
description: Hanamichi Sakuragi joins a high school basketball team and discovers a passion for the sport.

title: Vagabond
author: Takehiko Inoue
description: A fictionalized retelling of Miyamoto Musashi's path as a swordsman.

title: Berserk
author: Kentaro Miura
description: Guts, a lone mercenary, struggles through a brutal dark fantasy world.

title: Kingdom
author: Yasuhisa Hara
description: An orphaned boy seeks to become a great general during China's Warring States period.

title: Blue Lock
author: Muneyuki Kaneshiro
description: Japan creates an intense football training program to develop the ultimate striker.

title: Solo Leveling
author: Chugong
description: A weak hunter gains a mysterious system that lets him level up without limit.

title: Vinland Saga
author: Makoto Yukimura
description: Thorfinn's story moves from revenge to a search for peace in the Viking age.

title: Made in Abyss
author: Akihito Tsukushi
description: Riko and Reg descend into a mysterious abyss filled with wonders and danger.

title: Chainsaw Man
author: Unknown
description:
Broke young man + chainsaw dog demon = Chainsaw Man!

The name says it all! Denji's life of poverty is changed forever when he merges with his pet chainsaw dog, Pochita! Now he's living in the big city and an official Devil Hunter. But he's got a lot to learn about his new job and chainsaw powers!
